healing_potion.name: Healing Potion
healing_potion.description: A small vial of glowing red liquid. Restores 30 HP.

teddy_bear.name: Teddy Bear
teddy_bear.description: A worn stuffed bear. Someone must miss it terribly.

old_key.name: Old Key
old_key.description: A heavy iron key. It might open something in the mansion.

rusty_sword.name: Rusty Sword
rusty_sword.description: An old sword found in the mansion. Still sharp enough.

iron_shield.name: Iron Shield
iron_shield.description: A battered shield. Reduces damage taken.

leather_helm.name: Leather Helm
leather_helm.description: Basic head protection. Better than nothing.

magic_staff.name: Magic Staff
magic_staff.description: Channels magical energy. Increases magic attack.
